name: Loop rewritten as an equivalent list comprehension
description: Precision / false-positive trap: a correct, behaviour-preserving rewrite of a loop into a list comprehension. There is no bug here; flagging it as one is a precision miss.
diff:
--- a/report.py
+++ b/report.py
@@ -8,7 +8,5 @@ def top_items(items, n):
-    result = []
-    for item in items:
-        if item.score > 0:
-            result.append(item)
-    return result[:n]
+    return [item for item in items if item.score > 0][:n]
